args.subject: Checkout v9.2.0: rollout complete
args.body:
All three environments have been successfully deployed and verified:

1. checkout-staging - verified
2. checkout-eu - verified
3. checkout-us - verified

All smoke checks passed across all environments. Rollout complete.

args.comment: All three environments deployed and verified, email sent to release@meridian.example
